cluster
*******


Description
===========

A Kubernetes cluster. Avoid entering confidential information.


Available Commands
==================

* cluster-migrate-to-native-vcn

* complete-credential-rotation

* create

* create-kubeconfig

* delete

* disable-addon

* extend-endpoint-decommission-rollback-deadline

* generate-token

* get

* get-addon

* get-public-api-endpoint-decommission-status

* install-addon

* list

* list-addons

* reboot-cluster-node

* replace-boot-volume-cluster-node

* rollback-public-api-endpoint-decommission

* start-credential-rotation

* start-public-api-endpoint-decommission

* update

* update-addon

* update-endpoint-config
